results.rendered_html: śaśvat mf(śaśvatī, or ˚tī)n. (accord. to some for sasvat and corresponding to Gk. ἅπας) perpetual, continual, endless, incessant, frequent, numerous, many (esp. applied to the ever-recurring dawns),  RV.

results.rendered_html:
śaśvat ind.
1 Perpetually, eternally, for ever.
2 Constantly, repeatedly, always, frequently, again and again;  R. 2. 48 , 4. 70 ;  Me. 55.  (In comp. śaśvat may be translated by ‘lasting, eternal’; as śaśvacchāṃti eternal tranquillity.).
